name: Garlic-Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Grate the fresh Parmesan cheese.
3. Cut the stems from the mushrooms and place them in a baking dish.
4. Fill each mushroom cap with the grated Parmesan, bread crumbs, garlic bechamel sauce, salt, white pepper, and cayenne pepper.
5. Place the sliced scallions on top of the stuffed mushrooms.
6. Melt 3 tablespoons of unsalted butter and spoon it over the top of each mushroom.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until the mushrooms are tender and the cheese is melted and golden brown.
8. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
